string 2:
Hey, look! Look at all the allies that've gathered here!
It's all thanks to you!

Twelve Royal Knights... I think we just might be able to
save the world!
...I would not be so sure of that just yet.
Th-That voice?!
Wh-Who are you...?!
{next}Do you know who it is?
{next}It can't be...
{next}You seem pretty tough. Can I have your autograph?

It's the mythical thirteenth member of the Royal Knights...
Alphamon!

It's the mythical thirteenth member of the Royal Knights...
Alphamon!
Humans always take the most foolish actions!

It's the mythical thirteenth member of the Royal Knights...
Alphamon!

Alphamon, who occupies the Empty Seat of the Royal Knights!
Making a rare appearance now... But why?

I must now test your virtue, for nothing is worse than a 
flawed sense of justice.
Such hostility... Is Alphamon serious right now?!
{next}You won't help us?
{next}Why is it necessary to fight?
{end}This is all quite sudden. Can you wait a bit?

It must be determined first whether such a thing is
possible.

Some things can only be confirmed by taking action through
battle.
...Let us get this over with.

I find that humans often try to justify their cruel
experiments on Digimon as "research."

Yet there are some humans who reject such norms. I must see
if they deserve my trust.

Are humans truly trustworthy? I learned back
then that I must focus on what is just.

There are good humans in addition to the bad ones! The
friendship between us is real!

That is what I wish to ascertain. Now, step forth as a 
representative of your cause!
{next}I'll do it.
{next}Do we really have to fight?
{next}You got this, Gabumon!
No, leave this to Gabumon and me.

If we do not fight, then neither you nor I can proceed
forward.

Huh?! Me?! Well, I guess that was the plan all along. Let's
go, partner!

Besides, it's not like we were just playing cards until the
Royal Knights assembled.

We fight as one! It's time to show the results of our
training!
Yaaaaaaah!

You fulfilled your promise to bring all of us together. Now
it is our turn to take action!

So you have faith in humans... Very well. Show me the "justice" 
in which you believe!

So this is the strength of the bond between humans and
Digimon...

Most impressive, O thirteenth member of the Royal Knights...
You were super strong.

You have demonstrated to me your resolve as well as the
potential of humankind.

I will sheathe my weapon for the time being and resolve
myself to quiet observation.
{next}Glad you understand.
{next}Won't you join us as an ally?
{next}But did we really need to fight?

Do not misunderstand me. I am merely letting you go for now.
But if you humans stray...
Ally? There is no one I consider worthy of such a term.

There is still much that I do not understand
about humans other than you.

Agumon... Gabumon... I see that you both have grown quite
strong.
Thank you...

Your strength is a result of this bond you share. You have
proven humankind's potential.
It looks like we made a pretty favorable impression.
I hope we can get along better...

Anyway, let's do our best so Alphamon doesn't worry about
us!

Hey, I want you to have this as a token of our friendship! I
hope you'll accept it!

Ramen, meatloaf, omelet rice... I think I could get used to
the human world.

Yes, it is I, Alphamon. I find things somewhat difficult if
I take my usual form.
It may indeed be worth trying to save this world...
